metadata.description: Free-first paid advertising audit and optimization plugin for Claude Code — focused on Meta, Google, and TikTok. Guided onboarding (/ads start) + continuous coach (/ads next) added in v2.4.0.

plugins.name: claude-ads
plugins.description: Free-first paid advertising audit and AI creative generation, focused on the 3 platforms where 95% of ad spend lives: Meta, Google, TikTok. Guided first-run wizard (/ads start) + continuous coach (/ads next). ~158 weighted checks, parallel agents, industry templates, PPC math, A/B test design, PDF reports, and /ads update for refreshing platform references.
